title: Phi Family LLM Model Spec
description: Model specification for Phi-family instruct models. Uses user/end chat template.
documentation:
## Purpose
Tags a model spec as belonging to Microsoft's Phi model family, enabling the runtime to apply the `<|user|>` / `<|end|>` chat template used by Phi-3 and related models.

## When to use
This tag is assigned during content inspection when a Phi-family model is detected. Use it in cap selectors when you need to guarantee that only Phi-compatible models are accepted.

## Notes
Phi models are typically compact (1B–7B parameters) and optimised for reasoning tasks. The chat template differs significantly from Llama and Mistral templates; mixing up the template will degrade output quality.
